testcase.name: test_create_internal_product_with_intake_questions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter95_pricing_arch.py:198: in test_create_internal_product_with_intake_questions assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Create internal with intake failed: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create internal with intake failed: 500 {"detail":"An internal error occurred. Please try again later."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_product_with_intake_schema
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter95_pricing_arch.py:346: in test_update_product_with_intake_schema assert update_resp.status_code == 200, f"Update with intake failed: {update_resp.status_code} {update_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Update with intake failed: 500 {"detail":"An internal error occurred. Please try again later."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pricing_calc_internal_with_number_intake
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter95_pricing_arch.py:427: in test_pricing_calc_internal_with_number_intake assert create_resp.status_code == 200, f"Create product for calc failed: {create_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create product for calc failed: {"detail":"An internal error occurred. Please try again later."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
